questionHtml: Using your answer from part (a)(ii), calculate the total amount Ruben will pay over the life of the loan, to the nearest ZAR. Do not include the initial down payment.
markschemeHtml:
3984.95 × 60                    (M1)

239097 ZAR                    A1

Note: Do not award A1 if answer is not given to the nearest rand, unless already penalized in part (a)(ii).

[2 marks]
